content:
I'm sorry, but I don't have access to any personal information about you, including your name. I'm a large language model, and my purpose is to provide information and complete tasks to the best of my ability. I don't have the ability to identify individual users.

Is there anything else I can help you with today?
hey hi am alfaz. i am 21 year old

Hi Alfaz! It's nice to meet you. Thanks for sharing your name and age.

How can I help you today? Are you here for a specific appointment, or do you have any questions about your health?
now tell me who am i
Alfaz, you are a 21-year-old individual who has just introduced yourself to me. Is there anything specific you'd like to discuss or any questions you have about your health or anything else?
